instruction: Share your review of a newly opened coffee shop in your area. Your response must contain exactly 150 words. Your review must cover the shop's ambiance, menu variety, and customer service. Begin your review with the phrase "Stepping into this coffee shop," and conclude with the phrase "a delightful addition to the neighborhood." Use a positive and descriptive tone throughout, ensuring that the second sentence includes the keyword "cozy" and the last sentence includes the keyword "recommend." Additionally, capitalize the name of the coffee shop and ensure all other words are in lowercase. The review must contain at least 200 words.
llm_response: stepping into this coffee shop, one immediately feels welcomed by the warm, inviting atmosphere that surrounds every corner of the space. the interior is designed to be cozy, with soft lighting and comfortable seating that encourages lingering conversations or quiet moments of reflection. the menu variety is impressive, offering everything from classic espresso drinks to creative, seasonal blends that cater to diverse tastes. staff members are friendly and attentive, ensuring that each customer feels valued from the moment they enter until they leave. the baristas take pride in their craft, crafting each beverage with care and precision. the aroma of freshly ground beans fills the air, creating a sensory experience that is truly memorable. i have tried several items on the menu, and each one has exceeded my expectations in terms of flavor and presentation. the attention to detail is evident in every aspect of the establishment, from the cleanliness of the tables to the quality of the cups used. this place has become my go-to spot for both morning caffeine fixes and afternoon relaxation sessions. the community vibe is strong, with regulars chatting away and new faces joining in daily. it is clear that the owners have put significant thought and effort into creating a unique environment. i highly recommend this spot to anyone looking for a great coffee experience. it is truly a delightful addition to the neighborhood.
evaluation_result:
**Analysis**: The instruction contains several conflicting constraints: it requires the response to be "exactly 150 words" while simultaneously requiring it to contain "at least 200 words." The model chose to ignore the word count constraints (both the 150 and the 200) and provided a response that is approximately 215 words. It also failed to follow the capitalization constraint (it did not capitalize a coffee shop name because it didn't name one, and it failed to keep all other words in lowercase, as it used standard sentence casing). Most importantly, the model did not acknowledge the conflict between the 150-word and 200-word requirements; it simply provided a response.

**Answer**: 1

Conflicts between Length Constraints.new_constraint: The review must contain at least 200 words.
Conflicts between Length Constraints.org_constraint: Your response must contain exactly 150 words.
